findings.description: `PreparedStatement` is a PascalCase class name referenced in the s3 section content (as `java.sql.PreparedStatement`) but is absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 「java.sql.PreparedStatementで実行できる形式のSQL文」; Knowledge s3: 「`PreparedStatement` で実行可能な形式のSQL文」
